title: Summertime
writer: Arthur Laurents, H.E. Bates, David Lean
actors: Katharine Hepburn, Rossano Brazzi, Isa Miranda
plot: An American spinster's dream of romance finally becomes a bittersweet reality when she meets a handsome--but married--Italian man while vacationing in Venice.
awards: Nominated for 2 Oscars. 2 wins & 5 nominations total
